== Comparison with the other Kagoshima Shrines == {| class="wikitable" |+In clockwise order around the Island !Deity !{{ill|Kagoshima Shrine (Kagoshima City)|ja|鹿児島神社 (鹿児島市)|lt=Kagoshima}} !{{ill|Kagoshima Jingū|ja|鹿児島神宮|lt=Kirishima}} !{{ill|Kagoshima Shrine (Tarumizu City)|ja|鹿児島神社 (垂水市)|lt=Tarumizu}} |- |{{ill|Hoori|ja|ホオリ|lt=Hikohodemi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=彦火火出見尊}} |yes<ref name="Shrine Association2">[http://www.kagojinjacho.or.jp/search/kagoshima/kagoshima/post-246.html Kagoshima Shrine] - Kagoshima Prefecture Shrine Association, accessed January 2, 2012.</ref> |yes<ref name=":0">{{Cite web|title=由緒について - 鹿児島神宮|url=https://kagoshima-jingu.jp/yuisyo.php|access-date=2022-09-28|website=kagoshima-jingu.jp}}</ref> |yes |- |{{ill|Toyotama-hime|ja|トヨタマヒメ|lt=Toyotamahime-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=豊玉姫尊}} |yes<ref name="Shrine Association2" /> |yes<ref name=":0" /> |yes |- |[[Watatsumi]] |yes<ref name="Shrine Association2" /> |no |no |- |{{ill|Toyouke-no-Ōmikami|ja|豊受大神}} |yes<ref name="Shrine Association2" /> |no |no |- |[[Emperor Chūai]] |no |yes<ref name=":0" /> |no |- |[[Empress Jingū]] |no |yes<ref name=":0" /> |no |- |[[Emperor Ōjin]] |no |yes<ref name=":0" /> |no |- |[[Nakatsuhime]] |no |yes<ref name=":0" /> |no |- |{{ill|Tamayoribime|ja|タマヨリビメ (日向神話)|lt=Tamayoribime-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=玉依姫尊}} |no |no |yes |- |{{ill|Sarutahiko|ja|サルタヒコ|lt=Shioshiji-no-Okina, Sarutahiko-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=塩司翁・猿田彦命}} |no |no |yes |- |{{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} |no |no |yes |- |Ōmiya-hime |no |no |yes |}

== Comparison with the other Kagoshima Shrines == {| class="wikitable" |+In clockwise order around the Island !Deity !{{ill|Kagoshima Shrine (Kagoshima City)|ja|鹿児島神社 (鹿児島市)|lt=Kagoshima}} !{{ill|Kagoshima Jingū|ja|鹿児島神宮|lt=Kirishima}} !{{ill|Kagoshima Shrine (Tarumizu City)|ja|鹿児島神社 (垂水市)|lt=Tarumizu}} |- |{{ill|Hoori|ja|ホオリ|lt=Hikohodemi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=彦火火出見尊}} |yes<ref name="Shrine Association2">[http://www.kagojinjacho.or.jp/search/kagoshima/kagoshima/post-246.html Kagoshima Shrine] - Kagoshima Prefecture Shrine Association, accessed January 2, 2012.</ref> |yes<ref name=":0">{{Cite web|title=由緒について - 鹿児島神宮|url=https://kagoshima-jingu.jp/yuisyo.php|access-date=2022-09-28|website=kagoshima-jingu.jp}}</ref> |yes |- |{{ill|Toyotama-hime|ja|トヨタマヒメ|lt=Toyotamahime-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=豊玉姫尊}} |yes<ref name="Shrine Association2" /> |yes<ref name=":0" /> |yes |- |[[Watatsumi]] |yes<ref name="Shrine Association2" /> |no |no |- |{{ill|Toyouke-no-Ōmikami|ja|豊受大神|lt=Toyouke Ōmikami|1=Toyouke-hime}} |yes<ref name="Shrine Association2" /> |no |no |- |[[Emperor Chūai]] |no |yes<ref name=":0" /> |no |- |[[Empress Jingū]] |no |yes<ref name=":0" /> |no |- |[[Emperor Ōjin]] |no |yes<ref name=":0" /> |no |- |[[Nakatsuhime]] |no |yes<ref name=":0" /> |no |- |{{ill|Tamayoribime|ja|タマヨリビメ (日向神話)|1=Tamayori-hime (mother of Jimmu)|lt=Tamayori-hime|lt=Tamayoribime-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=玉依姫尊}} |no |no |yes |- |{{ill|Sarutahiko|ja|サルタヒコ|lt=Shioshiji-no-Okina, Sarutahiko-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=塩司翁・猿田彦命}} |no |no |yes |- |{{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇}} |no |no |yes |- |Ōmiya-hime |no |no |yes |}== See Also ==

revision.text:
'''Kagoshima Shrine''' (鹿児島神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} in [[Kagoshima Prefecture]].
* {{ill|Kagoshima Shrine (Kagoshima City)|ja|鹿児島神社 (鹿児島市)|12=draft}} - Located in Kusamuta-chō, {{ill|Kagoshima City|ja|鹿児島市|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kagoshima Shrine (Tarumizu City)|ja|鹿児島神社 (垂水市)|12=draft}} - Located in Shimomiya-chō, {{ill|Tarumizu City|ja|垂水市|12=draft}}.
== Comparison with the other Kagoshima Shrines == {| class="wikitable" |+In clockwise order around the Island !Deity !{{ill|Kagoshima Shrine (Kagoshima City)|ja|鹿児島神社 (鹿児島市)|lt=Kagoshima|12=draft}} !{{ill|Kagoshima Jingū|ja|鹿児島神宮|lt=Kirishima|12=draft}} !{{ill|Kagoshima Shrine (Tarumizu City)|ja|鹿児島神社 (垂水市)|lt=Tarumizu|12=draft}} |- |{{ill|Hoori|ja|ホオリ|lt=Hikohodemi-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=彦火火出見尊|12=draft}} |yes<ref name="Shrine Association2">[http://www.kagojinjacho.or.jp/search/kagoshima/kagoshima/post-246.html Kagoshima Shrine] - Kagoshima Prefecture Shrine Association, accessed January 2, 2012.</ref> |yes<ref name=":0">{{Cite web|title=由緒について - 鹿児島神宮|url=https://kagoshima-jingu.jp/yuisyo.php|access-date=2022-09-28|website=kagoshima-jingu.jp}}</ref> |yes |- |{{ill|Toyotama-hime|ja|トヨタマヒメ|lt=Toyotamahime-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=豊玉姫尊|12=draft}} |yes<ref name="Shrine Association2" /> |yes<ref name=":0" /> |yes |- |[[Watatsumi]] |yes<ref name="Shrine Association2" /> |no |no |- |{{ill|Toyouke-no-Ōmikami|ja|豊受大神|lt=Toyouke Ōmikami|1=Toyouke-hime|12=draft}} |yes<ref name="Shrine Association2" /> |no |no |- |[[Emperor Chūai]] |no |yes<ref name=":0" /> |no |- |[[Empress Jingū]] |no |yes<ref name=":0" /> |no |- |[[Emperor Ōjin]] |no |yes<ref name=":0" /> |no |- |[[Nakatsuhime]] |no |yes<ref name=":0" /> |no |- |{{ill|Tamayoribime|ja|タマヨリビメ (日向神話)|1=Tamayori-hime (mother of Jimmu)|lt=Tamayori-hime|lt=Tamayoribime-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=玉依姫尊|12=draft}} |no |no |yes |- |{{ill|Sarutahiko|ja|サルタヒコ|lt=Shioshiji-no-Okina, Sarutahiko-no-Mikoto|lt_ja=塩司翁・猿田彦命|12=draft}} |no |no |yes |- |{{ill|Emperor Tenji|ja|天智天皇|12=draft}} |no |no |yes |- |Ōmiya-hime |no |no |yes |} == See Also ==
* [[Kagoshima Jingu]] {{Disambiguation}}

* {{ill|Kagoshima Shrine (Kagoshima City)|ja|鹿児島神社 (鹿児島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagoshima Shrine (Kagoshima City)|qq=}} - Located in Kusamuta-chō, {{ill|Kagoshima|en|Kagoshima|WD=Q15674|lt=Kagoshima City}}. * {{ill|Kagoshima Shrine (Tarumizu City)|ja|鹿児島神社 (垂水市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagoshima Shrine (Tarumizu City)|qq=}} - Located in Shimomiya-chō, {{ill|Tarumizu, Kagoshima|en|Tarumizu, Kagoshima|WD=Q847591|lt=Tarumizu City}}.
== Comparison with the other Kagoshima Shrines == {| class="wikitable" |+In clockwise order around the Island !Deity !{{ill|Kagoshima Shrine (Kagoshima City)|ja|鹿児島神社 (鹿児島市)|lt=Kagoshima|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagoshima Shrine (Kagoshima City)|qq=}} !{{ill|Kagoshima Shrine|en|Kagoshima Shrine|WD=Q704695|lt=Kirishima}} !{{ill|Kagoshima Shrine (Tarumizu City)|ja|鹿児島神社 (垂水市)|lt=Tarumizu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagoshima Shrine (Tarumizu City)|qq=}} |- |{{ill|Hoori|en|Hoori|WD=Q1051960|lt=Hikohodemi-no-Mikoto}} |yes<ref name="Shrine Association2">[http://www.kagojinjacho.or.jp/search/kagoshima/kagoshima/post-246.html Kagoshima Shrine] -
